# Third-party / external art attributions

The aesthetic pass (S-370 §H, S-386 §I.0) authorized three valid
art-source paths for this project:

1. CC0 / public-domain pixel-art packs (Kenney, OpenGameArt, LPC, itch.io)
2. Procedural Stardew-quality generation (UI 9-slice + particle dots only)
3. Hybrid

S-386 mandates **path 1 (CC0 packs)** for all entity art (characters,
houses, knife, ground tiles). The composites under
`client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/` are stitched at build time
by `scripts/gen-3rd-party-composites.mjs` from the 3 Kenney CC0 packs
listed below — pure pixel copies + nearest-neighbour scale, no
procedural shape drawing.

## Attribution policy

When an asset gets dropped into this directory, the dropper MUST add an
entry below in the form:

```
- path: client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/<file>
  source_url: <url>
  license: <SPDX id, e.g. CC0-1.0 or CC-BY-4.0 or CC-BY-SA-3.0>
  author: <name>
  attribution_required: <yes/no>
  notes: <optional commentary>
```

CC-BY and CC-BY-SA assets MUST also be credited in the in-game credits
screen (currently the lobby footer). CC0 assets are tracked here for
provenance only.

## Bundled CC0 packs (S-386)

### Kenney Tiny Town

- path: client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/kenney_tiny-town/
- source_url: https://kenney.nl/assets/tiny-town
- license: CC0-1.0
- author: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
- attribution_required: no
- notes: 16×16 tile pack. Used for house composites (roof, eave, wall,
  door tiles indices 48-90) and ground tiles (grass + dirt-path
  indices 0/1/2/24) and the knife sprite (tile 30).

### Kenney Tiny Dungeon

- path: client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/kenney_tiny-dungeon/
- source_url: https://kenney.nl/assets/tiny-dungeon
- license: CC0-1.0
- author: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
- attribution_required: no
- notes: 16×16 tile pack. Used for character composites (hero/wizard/
  warrior/knight tiles indices 84-87, tomb tile 103) for the 5 game
  states ALIVE_CLOTHED / ALIVE_PANTS_DOWN / RUSHING / ATTACKING / DEAD.

### Kenney Particle Pack

- path: client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/kenney_particle-pack/
- source_url: https://kenney.nl/assets/particle-pack
- license: CC0-1.0
- author: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
- attribution_required: no
- notes: Pre-rendered alpha-falloff particle textures. Available for
  GPUParticles2D fall-back if the procedural Fx.gd dots ever need to
  be replaced with hand-painted variants.

## Endesga 32 palette (referenced, not embedded)

- file: client/assets/palette.tres (regenerated procedurally — values
  hardcoded, no PNG asset)
- source_url: https://lospec.com/palette-list/endesga-32
- license: CC0-1.0
- author: Endesga
- notes: 32-color palette used as the single source of truth for every
  programmatic color in the project (gen-ui-art.mjs, Fx.gd). No image
  data is bundled — only the RGB triplets.

## Procedural carve-outs (§I.0 path-excluded)

The following files are generated by build scripts and are CC0:

- client/assets/sprites/ui/wood_panel_9slice.png  ← scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs
- client/assets/sprites/ui/wood_button_9slice.png  ← scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs
- client/assets/sprites/ui/wood_button_pressed_9slice.png  ← scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs
- client/assets/sprites/ui/parchment_9slice.png  ← scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs
- client/assets/sprites/tiles/ground_atlas.png  ← scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs

Particle dot textures (32×32 alpha-falloff RGBA) live in
`client/scripts/particles/Fx.gd` and are constructed at runtime; the
§I.0 grep filter excludes `particles/` and `9slice` paths from the
procedural-art ban.

These are deterministic outputs of `node scripts/gen-ui-art.mjs` and may
be regenerated reproducibly.

## Composite outputs (S-386)

Built by `node scripts/gen-3rd-party-composites.mjs` from the CC0 packs
above. All composites inherit CC0-1.0 from their sources because they
are pure pixel copies + nearest-neighbour scale, no novel content:

- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/house_v{0..3}_d{0..3}.png
  (192×192, 16 variants — 4 styles × 4 damage stages)
- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/character_<state>.png
  (96×128, 5 states)
- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/knife.png (32×32)
- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/ground_atlas.png (256×64)
- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/ground_lattice_11.png
  (1536×768) — pre-baked 11×11 iso lattice for Ground.gd
- client/assets/sprites/3rd-party/composites/ground_lattice_9.png
  (1280×640) — pre-baked 9×9 iso lattice for LandingHero.gd
